items.title: Smallest worthwhile effect of anterior cruciate ligament reconstruction compared with non-surgical management: a benefit-harm trade-off study.
items.summary: A benefit-harm trade-off study with 92 recreational or competitive athletes estimated the smallest worthwhile effect of ACL reconstruction for improving knee function and return to sport compared to rehabilitation only.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究提供了 ACL 重建对比非手术管理在膝关节功能和重返运动方面的最小有益效应估计。这有助于你与患者进行风险-收益权衡讨论，量化治疗预期。
items.titleZh: 前交叉韧带重建与非手术管理相比的最小有益效应：一项收益-危害权衡研究
items.summaryZh: 一项包含 92 名休闲或竞技运动员的收益-危害权衡研究估计了前交叉韧带重建在改善膝关节功能和重返运动方面，与仅康复相比的最小有益效应。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study provides estimates for the smallest worthwhile effect of ACL reconstruction versus non-surgical management on knee function and return to sport. This helps you in risk-benefit discussions with patients, quantifying treatment expectations.
items.limitation: 本研究通过在线调查进行，参与者的偏好和报告可能存在偏差。
items.limitationEn: This study was conducted via an online survey, and participant preferences and reporting may introduce bias.

items.title: Critically appraised paper: Mobile-based pulmonary rehabilitation improved exercise capacity as much as and health status more than centre-based pulmonary rehabilitation for chronic obstructive pulmonary disease [commentary].
items.summary: This critically appraised paper comments on research suggesting mobile-based pulmonary rehabilitation improved exercise capacity as much as and health status more than center-based pulmonary rehabilitation for chronic obstructive pulmonary disease.
items.curatedReason: 这篇评论指出，基于移动设备的肺康复在改善 COPD 患者运动能力方面不劣于中心基地康复，且在健康状况方面可能更优。这支持了远程肺康复作为可行替代方案，尤其适用于依从性不佳的患者。
items.titleZh: 评论：基于移动设备的肺康复在改善慢性阻塞性肺疾病运动能力方面不劣于中心基地肺康复，且在健康状况方面可能更优。
items.summaryZh: 这篇评论文章审视了一项研究，该研究提示基于移动设备的肺康复在改善慢性阻塞性肺疾病患者运动能力方面不劣于中心基地肺康复，并在健康状况方面可能表现更优。
items.curatedReasonEn: This commentary suggests that mobile-based pulmonary rehabilitation is non-inferior to center-based rehabilitation in improving exercise capacity and potentially superior in health status for COPD patients. This supports telerehabilitation as a viable alternative, especially for patients with poor adherence.

items.title: The psychosocial impacts of having eating and drinking difficulties after stroke: a qualitative evidence synthesis.
items.summary: A qualitative evidence synthesis of 22 studies, involving 645 informants, identified significant psychological and social impacts of eating and drinking difficulties after stroke, extending beyond physical impairment.
items.curatedReason: 这项高质量证据合成深入揭示了卒中后吞咽困难对患者心理社会影响的广度和深度。你在制定康复计划时，除了生理功能外，也必须重视并解决这些情感和社会参与障碍。
items.titleZh: 卒中后吞咽困难的心理社会影响：一项定性证据合成
items.summaryZh: 一项包含 22 项研究、涉及 645 名受访者的定性证据合成发现，卒中后吞咽困难除了生理障碍外，还会产生显著的心理和社会影响。
items.curatedReasonEn: This high-quality evidence synthesis deeply reveals the breadth and depth of psychosocial impacts of post-stroke eating and drinking difficulties. When developing rehabilitation plans, you must not only focus on physiological function but also address these emotional and social participation barriers.
items.limitation: 本综述纳入的原始研究异质性可能影响结果的综合解释。
items.limitationEn: The heterogeneity of the included primary studies may affect the integrated interpretation of the results.

items.title: Reliability of digital algometer-based pressure pain threshold measurement in patients with end-stage knee osteoarthritis: a single-center reliability study.
items.summary: This prospective observational study, involving 60 patients with end-stage knee osteoarthritis, found high relative reliability (ICC values 0.82-0.91) for digital algometer-based pressure pain threshold assessment at local and remote sites.
items.curatedReason: 数字测痛仪在终末期膝骨关节炎患者的压痛阈（PPT）测量中显示出高信度。你可以在临床评估膝骨关节炎患者的疼痛敏感性时，放心使用这种工具。
items.titleZh: 数字测痛仪在终末期膝骨关节炎患者中压痛阈测量信度研究：一项单中心信度研究
items.summaryZh: 这项前瞻性观察研究涵盖了 60 名终末期膝骨关节炎患者，发现数字测痛仪在局部和远端部位的压痛阈测量具有较高的相对信度（ICC 值为 0.82-0.91）。
items.curatedReasonEn: Digital algometer-based pressure pain threshold (PPT) measurements demonstrate high reliability in patients with end-stage knee osteoarthritis. You can confidently use this tool for assessing pain sensitivity in KOA patients in clinical practice.
items.limitation: 研究对象仅限于终末期膝骨关节炎患者，结果外推到其他疼痛人群需谨慎。
items.limitationEn: The study population was limited to patients with end-stage knee osteoarthritis, so generalizing the results to other pain populations should be done with caution.

items.title: Online group exercise for people with Parkinson's disease: rehabilitation and fitness professionals' experiences to inform physiotherapy practice and service delivery - a qualitative interview study.
items.summary: A qualitative interview study with 10 rehabilitation and fitness professionals explored their experiences delivering online group exercise for people with Parkinson's disease, identifying themes related to current practices and standards.
items.curatedReason: 这项定性研究揭示了康复和健身专业人员在为帕金森病患者提供在线团体运动时的经验和挑战。这些见解对于优化远程康复服务、确保质量和可及性至关重要。
items.titleZh: 帕金森病患者的在线团体运动：康复和健身专业人员的经验，以指导物理治疗实践和服务提供——一项定性访谈研究
items.summaryZh: 一项针对 10 名康复和健身专业人员的定性访谈研究，探讨了他们在为帕金森病患者提供在线团体运动时的经验，并确定了与当前实践和标准相关的主题。
items.curatedReasonEn: This qualitative study reveals the experiences and challenges of rehabilitation and fitness professionals in delivering online group exercise for people with Parkinson's disease. These insights are crucial for optimizing telerehabilitation services, ensuring quality and accessibility.
items.limitation: 本研究为定性研究，样本量较小（10 人），结果主要反映受访者的主观经验，不具普遍推论性。
items.limitationEn: This is a qualitative study with a small sample size (10 participants), and the results primarily reflect the subjective experiences of the interviewees, lacking generalizability.

items.title: Triceps Surae Neuromuscular Activity During Single-leg Jumping Tasks in Individuals After Anterior Cruciate Ligament Reconstruction.
items.summary: This study compared triceps surae electromyographic (EMG) activity during single-leg jumping tasks between individuals after anterior cruciate ligament reconstruction (ACLR) and healthy controls, also examining bilateral differences within the ACLR group.
items.curatedReason: ACL 重建术后单腿跳跃任务中，小腿三头肌的肌电活动可能与健康对照组存在差异。这提示你在康复训练中，应特别关注小腿三头肌的功能恢复，以降低再损伤风险。
items.titleZh: 前交叉韧带重建术后个体单腿跳跃任务中小腿三头肌的神经肌肉活动
items.summaryZh: 本研究比较了前交叉韧带重建术后个体与健康对照组在单腿跳跃任务中小腿三头肌的肌电活动，并检查了 ACLR 组内的双侧差异。
items.curatedReasonEn: In single-leg jumping tasks after ACL reconstruction, triceps surae EMG activity may differ from healthy controls. This suggests that you should pay particular attention to triceps surae functional recovery during rehabilitation to reduce re-injury risk.
items.limitation: 本研究为横断面研究，无法建立因果关系，且 EMG 数据可能受多种因素影响。
items.limitationEn: This is a cross-sectional study, unable to establish causality, and EMG data may be influenced by multiple factors.
items.journal: International journal of sports physical therapy

items.title: Mindset, Effort, and Support-the foundation for patients' decision to return to sport after an anterior cruciate ligament injury. A qualitative analysis from the NACOX Cohort.
items.summary: A qualitative analysis of 112 patients from the NACOX Cohort identified three main categories—motivation and driving forces, treatment and recovery, and medical clearance and readiness—determining patients' decisions to return to sport after an ACL injury.
items.curatedReason: 这项定性研究深入分析了 ACL 损伤患者重返运动决策的心理、努力和支持因素。在指导患者 RTS 时，你不仅要评估生理指标，更要理解并支持他们的心理状态和外部支持系统。
items.titleZh: 心态、努力和支持——前交叉韧带损伤患者重返运动决策的基础：NACOX 队列的定性分析
items.summaryZh: 一项对 NACOX 队列中 112 名患者进行的定性分析确定了驱动力与动机、治疗与恢复、以及医疗许可与准备这三个主要类别，这些因素决定了 ACL 损伤患者重返运动的决策。
items.curatedReasonEn: This qualitative study deeply analyzes the mindset, effort, and support factors influencing ACL injury patients' return-to-sport decisions. When guiding patients to RTS, you must not only assess physiological indicators but also understand and support their psychological state and external support systems.
items.limitation: 本研究为定性分析，结果基于患者自由文本回答，可能存在信息遗漏和解释偏倚。
items.limitationEn: This is a qualitative analysis, and the results are based on patients' free-text answers, which may have information omissions and interpretation bias.
items.journal: Physical therapy in sport : official journal of the Association of Chartered Physiotherapists in Sports Medicine

items.title: Factors Affecting Clinical Decision Making for Blood Flow Restriction Training in Pediatric and Adolescent Patients Following Anterior Cruciate Ligament Injury.
items.summary: A cross-sectional survey of physical therapists treating pediatric and adolescent patients post-ACL injury explored factors affecting clinical decision-making for blood flow restriction training (BFRT) use and exercise prescription.
items.curatedReason: 这项调查揭示了物理治疗师在 ACL 损伤儿童和青少年患者中使用血流限制训练（BFRT）时的临床决策影响因素。它有助于你了解 BFRT 在儿科 PT 实践中的实际应用现状及其与研究的一致性。
items.titleZh: 影响儿童和青少年前交叉韧带损伤患者血流限制训练临床决策的因素
items.summaryZh: 一项针对治疗 ACL 损伤后儿童和青少年患者的物理治疗师的横断面调查，探讨了影响血流限制训练（BFRT）使用和运动处方临床决策的因素。
items.curatedReasonEn: This survey reveals factors influencing physical therapists' clinical decisions when using blood flow restriction training (BFRT) in pediatric and adolescent patients with ACL injuries. It helps you understand the current practical application of BFRT in pediatric PT and its concordance with research.
items.limitation: 本研究为横断面调查，依赖于物理治疗师的自我报告，可能存在回忆偏倚和报告偏倚。
items.limitationEn: This is a cross-sectional survey, relying on physical therapists' self-reports, which may involve recall and reporting bias.
items.journal: International journal of sports physical therapy

items.title: The Perspective and Needs of Older Adults With Osteoporosis With a Recent Upper Extremity Fragility Fracture Concerning Fall Risk and Fear of Falling.
items.summary: This qualitative study explored the perspectives of older adults with osteoporosis who had upper extremity fractures, focusing on their health concerns, the impact of falls and fear of falling (FoF) on daily life, and their views on rehabilitation.
items.curatedReason: 这项定性研究深刻揭示了骨质疏松性上肢脆性骨折老年患者对跌倒风险和跌倒恐惧的看法和需求。在制定这类患者的康复计划时，你必须把跌倒恐惧和心理支持作为核心要素，而不仅仅是骨折的机械愈合。
items.titleZh: 骨质疏松性上肢脆性骨折老年患者对跌倒风险和跌倒恐惧的看法和需求
items.summaryZh: 这项定性研究探讨了骨质疏松性上肢脆性骨折老年患者的观点，重点关注他们的健康问题、跌倒及跌倒恐惧（FoF）对日常生活的影响以及他们对康复的看法。
items.curatedReasonEn: This qualitative study profoundly reveals the perspectives and needs of older adults with osteoporotic upper extremity fragility fractures regarding fall risk and fear of falling. When developing rehabilitation plans for these patients, you must prioritize fear of falling and psychological support as core elements, not just mechanical fracture healing.
items.limitation: 本研究为定性研究，样本量较小，结果主要反映受访者的主观经验，不具普遍推论性。
items.limitationEn: This is a qualitative study with a small sample size, and the results primarily reflect the subjective experiences of the interviewees, lacking generalizability.

items.title: Effects of Dynamic Taping on Dynamic Balance and Proprioception in Recreational Athletes with Chronic Ankle Instability.
items.summary: A single-blind randomized controlled trial with 28 recreational athletes with chronic ankle instability found dynamic taping to be as effective as sports taping in improving dynamic balance and proprioception immediately post-application.
items.curatedReason: 这项 RCT 表明，动态贴扎在改善慢性踝关节不稳（CAI）患者的动态平衡和本体感觉方面，可能与传统运动贴扎效果相当。对于寻求不限制运动的辅助支持的 CAI 患者，可以考虑使用动态贴扎。
items.titleZh: 动态贴扎对慢性踝关节不稳休闲运动员动态平衡和本体感觉的影响
items.summaryZh: 一项针对 28 名慢性踝关节不稳休闲运动员的单盲随机对照试验发现，动态贴扎在应用后即刻改善动态平衡和本体感觉方面，与运动贴扎效果相当。
items.curatedReasonEn: This RCT indicates that dynamic taping may be as effective as traditional sports taping in improving dynamic balance and proprioception in patients with chronic ankle instability (CAI). For CAI patients seeking auxiliary support without restricting movement, dynamic taping can be considered.
items.limitation: 本研究为单盲随机对照试验，样本量较小（28 人），随访期短（即时效应），长期效果尚不明确。
items.limitationEn: This is a single-blind randomized controlled trial with a small sample size (28 participants) and short follow-up (immediate effects), so long-term effects are unclear.
items.journal: International journal of sports physical therapy

items.title: Biomechanical effects of Kinesio versus Mulligan ankle taping on balance and ankle function in chronic STROKE: A randomized controlled trial.
items.summary: This randomized controlled trial with 33 chronic stroke individuals found significant group differences in ankle dorsiflexion passive range of motion and balance after six weeks of Kinesio taping with treadmill training, Mulligan taping with treadmill training, or treadmill training alone.
items.curatedReason: 这项 RCT 提示，Kinesio 贴扎或 Mulligan 贴扎结合跑步机训练，可能比单纯跑步机训练更能改善慢性卒中患者的踝关节背屈活动度、平衡和踝关节功能。在治疗慢性卒中患者时，你可以考虑将这些贴扎技术整合到训练方案中。
items.titleZh: Kinesio 贴扎与 Mulligan 踝关节贴扎对慢性卒中患者平衡和踝关节功能的生物力学效应：一项随机对照试验
items.summaryZh: 这项对 33 名慢性卒中患者进行的随机对照试验发现，在为期六周的 Kinesio 贴扎结合跑步机训练、Mulligan 贴扎结合跑步机训练或单独跑步机训练后，踝关节背屈被动活动度和平衡方面存在显著的组间差异。
items.curatedReasonEn: This RCT suggests that Kinesio taping or Mulligan taping combined with treadmill training may improve ankle dorsiflexion ROM, balance, and ankle function more than treadmill training alone in chronic stroke patients. When treating chronic stroke patients, you can consider integrating these taping techniques into training protocols.
items.limitation: 本研究样本量较小（33 人），且结果主要集中在短期效应，长期效果需进一步研究。
items.limitationEn: This study has a small sample size (33 participants) and primarily focuses on short-term effects; long-term effects require further research.

items.title: Effectiveness of manual therapy with pragmatic physiotherapy for rotator cuff-related shoulder pain: a pilot randomized clinical trial.
items.summary: This pilot randomized clinical trial involving 68 participants found that pragmatic physiotherapy with manual therapy for rotator cuff-related shoulder pain was feasible and showed preliminary treatment effects on patient-reported outcomes.
items.curatedReason: 这项初步 RCT 表明，对于肩袖相关性肩痛，在常规物理治疗中加入手法治疗是可行的，且可能带来额外的治疗效果。可以将其作为未来更大规模研究的依据。
items.titleZh: 手法治疗结合务实物理治疗对肩袖相关性肩痛的有效性：一项初步随机临床试验
items.summaryZh: 这项初步随机临床试验纳入了 68 名受试者，发现手法治疗结合务实物理治疗对肩袖相关性肩痛是可行的，并对患者报告结局显示出初步疗效。
items.curatedReasonEn: This pilot RCT indicates that incorporating manual therapy into pragmatic physiotherapy for rotator cuff-related shoulder pain is feasible and may offer additional therapeutic benefits. This can serve as a basis for larger future studies.
items.limitation: 本研究是初步性随机临床试验，样本量相对较小，效应量需在更大规模的 RCT 中进一步验证。
items.limitationEn: This is a pilot randomized clinical trial with a relatively small sample size, and the effect sizes need further validation in larger RCTs.

items.title: Adapting the MSK-HQ for paediatric musculoskeletal care: Insights from a national survey and focus group of physiotherapists.
items.summary: A national survey and focus group of 55 pediatric clinicians in the UK indicated a need and relevance for adapting the Musculoskeletal Health Questionnaire (MSK-HQ) for use in pediatric musculoskeletal services.
items.curatedReason: 英国物理治疗师普遍认为，骨骼肌肉健康问卷（MSK-HQ）有潜力适应儿童和青少年骨骼肌肉护理。这提示未来该工具在儿科 PT 中会有更广应用，值得关注其发展。
items.titleZh: 儿童青少年骨骼肌肉护理中 MSK-HQ 的适应性：一项全国物理治疗师调查和焦点小组的见解
items.summaryZh: 一项涵盖英国 55 名儿科临床医师的全国调查和焦点小组研究表明，有必要且适宜将骨骼肌肉健康问卷（MSK-HQ）应用于儿童青少年骨骼肌肉服务。
items.curatedReasonEn: UK physiotherapists generally believe that the Musculoskeletal Health Questionnaire (MSK-HQ) has potential for adaptation in pediatric musculoskeletal care. This suggests future broader application of the tool in pediatric PT, and its development is worth monitoring.
items.limitation: 本研究为定性调查和焦点小组研究，不涉及干预效果评价，结果仅反映受访者观点。
items.limitationEn: This study is a qualitative survey and focus group study, not evaluating intervention effects, and the results only reflect the perspectives of the respondents.

items.title: Usefulness of ChatGPT in physiotherapy practice: A scoping review.
items.summary: A scoping review mapping current evidence on ChatGPT's use in musculoskeletal physiotherapy found studies focused on how the technology was studied, rather than its effectiveness or readiness for clinical practice.
items.curatedReason: 该综述梳理了 ChatGPT 在物理治疗实践中的现有研究，主要集中于技术如何被研究。这表明 AI 工具在 PT 领域尚处于探索阶段，目前以工具研究为主，离临床应用还有距离。
items.titleZh: ChatGPT 在物理治疗实践中的实用性：一项范围综述
items.summaryZh: 一项关于 ChatGPT 在肌肉骨骼物理治疗中应用的范围综述发现，现有研究主要关注该技术的研究方式，而非其有效性或临床实践准备情况。
items.curatedReasonEn: This scoping review surveys existing research on ChatGPT in physiotherapy practice, focusing on how the technology has been studied. This indicates that AI tools in PT are still in an exploratory phase, primarily centered on tool research, and are some distance from clinical application.
items.limitation: 此为范围综述，不进行证据的质量评估或有效性评价，仅描绘研究现状。
items.limitationEn: This is a scoping review that does not critically appraise evidence quality or effectiveness, only mapping the current research landscape.

items.title: PRISM-MX for Post-Stroke Spasticity: Cross-Cultural Adaptation and Preliminary Psychometric Evaluation in a Mexican Sample.
items.summary: This pilot cross-sectional study of 30 Mexican adults with post-stroke spasticity demonstrated that the cross-culturally adapted Patient-Reported Impact of Spasticity Measure (PRISM-MX) showed good internal consistency (Cronbach's alpha 0.90) and preliminary convergent validity.
items.curatedReason: PRISM-MX 量表经过跨文化调适，在墨西哥卒中后痉挛患者中展现了良好的内部一致性和初步收敛效度。在墨西哥或类似文化背景下，可以考虑将其作为评估痉挛影响的有效工具。
items.titleZh: PRISM-MX 量表在卒中后痉挛患者中的跨文化调适与初步心理测量学评估（墨西哥样本）
items.summaryZh: 这项针对 30 名墨西哥卒中后痉挛成年患者的初步横断面研究表明，经过跨文化调适的痉挛患者自评影响量表（PRISM-MX）具有良好的内部一致性（Cronbach's alpha 0.90）和初步收敛效度。
items.curatedReasonEn: The PRISM-MX scale, after cross-cultural adaptation, demonstrates good internal consistency and preliminary convergent validity in Mexican stroke patients with spasticity. You can consider it an effective tool for assessing spasticity impact in Mexico or similar cultural contexts.
items.limitation: 本研究为初步横断面研究，样本量较小（30 人），仅提供了初步的心理测量学证据。
items.limitationEn: This is a preliminary cross-sectional study with a small sample size (30 participants), providing only preliminary psychometric evidence.

items.title: Early Access and Adherence to Physiotherapy in Children With Cerebral Palsy: Hospital-Based Study in Cameroon.
items.summary: A cross-sectional study in Cameroon found that only 38.3% of 94 children with cerebral palsy (aged 3-60 months) accessed physiotherapy early (before 5 months) and showed good adherence (≥50% of sessions).
items.curatedReason: 这项喀麦隆的研究表明，脑瘫儿童早期接受物理治疗和依从性普遍不足。这提醒你，在低资源环境下，不仅要提供服务，更要关注患者家庭的早期可及性与长期依从性支持。
items.titleZh: 喀麦隆脑瘫儿童早期物理治疗可及性和依从性：一项基于医院的研究
items.summaryZh: 喀麦隆的一项横断面研究发现，在 94 名脑瘫儿童（3-60 个月）中，只有 38.3% 的儿童早期（5 个月前）接受了物理治疗，并且表现出良好的依从性（≥50% 的治疗次数）。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study from Cameroon indicates that early access and adherence to physiotherapy are generally insufficient in children with cerebral palsy. This reminds you that in low-resource settings, it's crucial not only to provide services but also to focus on supporting early accessibility and long-term adherence for patients' families.
items.limitation: 本研究为单中心横断面研究，结果可能不适用于其他地区或更高资源环境。
items.limitationEn: This is a single-center cross-sectional study, and the results may not be applicable to other regions or higher-resource settings.
items.journal: Pediatric physical therapy : the official publication of the Section on Pediatrics of the American Physical Therapy Association

items.title: The use of focus of attention for instruction and feedback during telehealth physiotherapy: An observational study.
items.summary: An exploratory observational study examined 6 pediatric physiotherapists' use of focus of attention (FOA) when delivering instructions and feedback during telehealth sessions for 12 children with neurodevelopmental disorders.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究通过直接观察，揭示了儿科物理治疗师在远程治疗中如何使用注意力焦点（FOA）进行指令和反馈。这有助于你优化远程治疗沟通策略，提升运动学习效果。
items.titleZh: 远程物理治疗中注意力焦点在指令和反馈中的应用：一项观察性研究
items.summaryZh: 一项探索性观察研究调查了 6 名儿科物理治疗师在远程治疗中，如何对 12 名患有神经发育障碍的儿童使用注意力焦点（FOA）进行指令和反馈。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study, through direct observation, reveals how pediatric physical therapists use focus of attention (FOA) for instructions and feedback during telehealth. This helps you optimize telehealth communication strategies and enhance motor learning outcomes.
items.limitation: 本研究为探索性观察研究，样本量较小（6 名治疗师，12 名儿童），结果外推性有限。
items.limitationEn: This is an exploratory observational study with a small sample size (6 therapists, 12 children), and the generalizability of the results is limited.

items.title: Validating an Activity Monitor for Acute Care Patients: The Patient/Resident Mobility Tracker (PREEMPT).
items.summary: This study validated the PREEMPT activity monitor in 10 healthy older adults and 46 hospitalized patients, demonstrating its accuracy and validity by comparing its stride length, steps, stepping time, sedentary time, and activity time data against video truth data.
items.curatedReason: PREEMPT 活动监测仪在急性护理患者中显示出良好的有效性和可用性。你可以考虑将其应用于住院患者的活动量评估，为康复方案的制定提供客观数据。
items.titleZh: 验证用于急性护理患者的活动监测仪：患者/居民移动追踪器（PREEMPT）
items.summaryZh: 本研究在 10 名健康老年人和 46 名住院患者中验证了 PREEMPT 活动监测仪，通过将其步长、步数、行走时间、久坐时间和活动时间数据与视频真实数据进行比较，证明了其准确性和有效性。
items.curatedReasonEn: The PREEMPT activity monitor demonstrates good validity and usability in acute care patients. You can consider using it for assessing activity levels in hospitalized patients to provide objective data for rehabilitation planning.
items.limitation: 本研究健康老年人样本量较小，且受试者主要来自急性护理环境，结果在其他群体中需进一步验证。
items.limitationEn: The sample size of healthy older adults in this study was small, and participants were primarily from acute care settings, so the results need further validation in other populations.
items.journal: Physiotherapy research international : the journal for researchers and clinicians in physical therapy

items.title: Exercise-based cancer telerehabilitation is safe but not superior to a single session of physiotherapy for improving quality of life: a randomised trial.
items.summary: An assessor-blinded randomized controlled trial found that 8-week group exercise-based telerehabilitation was safe but not superior to a single session of in-person assessment and advice for improving health-related quality of life in adult cancer survivors.
items.curatedReason: 这项 RCT 证据表明，基于运动的癌症远程康复是安全的，但在改善癌症幸存者生活质量方面，与单次线下物理治疗评估和建议相比并无优势。你在推广远程康复时，要清晰告知患者其对生活质量的预期，并考虑成本效益。
items.titleZh: 基于运动的癌症远程康复是安全的，但与单次物理治疗相比，在改善生活质量方面无优势：一项随机试验
items.summaryZh: 一项评估者设盲的随机对照试验发现，为期 8 周的基于运动的团体远程康复是安全的，但与单次线下评估和建议相比，在改善成人癌症幸存者健康相关生活质量方面并无优势。
items.curatedReasonEn: This RCT evidence indicates that exercise-based cancer telerehabilitation is safe but not superior to a single in-person physiotherapy assessment and advice session for improving quality of life in cancer survivors. When promoting telerehabilitation, you must clearly inform patients about quality of life expectations and consider cost-effectiveness.
items.limitation: 本研究将远程康复与单次线下咨询进行比较，对照组干预强度较低，可能影响结果的解读。
items.limitationEn: This study compared telerehabilitation with a single in-person consultation, where the control group's intervention intensity was low, which might affect the interpretation of the results.

items.title: Figure-of-Eight Taping Combined with Rehabilitation for Multidirectional Shoulder Instability in a School-Age Female Karate Athlete: A Case Report.
items.summary: This case report describes the clinical course of a 12-year-old female karate athlete with multidirectional shoulder instability, where figure-of-eight taping effectively facilitated exercise therapy.
items.curatedReason: 这篇病例报告提示，八字贴扎技术可能通过促进康复训练，帮助学龄空手道运动员改善多方向肩关节不稳（MDI）。它提供了一个处理 MDI 的辅助思路。
items.titleZh: 八字贴扎结合康复训练治疗学龄空手道运动员多方向肩关节不稳：病例报告
items.summaryZh: 这篇病例报告描述了一名 12 岁女性空手道运动员多方向肩关节不稳的临床过程，八字贴扎有效促进了运动疗法。
items.curatedReasonEn: This case report suggests that figure-of-eight taping may facilitate rehabilitation exercises, helping school-age karate athletes with multidirectional shoulder instability (MDI). It offers an adjunctive approach for managing MDI.
items.limitation: 本研究为单病例报告，结论外推性非常有限。
items.limitationEn: This is a single case report, so the generalizability of the findings is very limited.
items.journal: International journal of sports physical therapy

items.title: Do blood flow restriction exercises offer additional benefits when compared to conventional exercises in musculoskeletal rehabilitation? A systematic review and meta-analysis.
items.summary: A systematic review and meta-analysis of RCTs found that low-load exercise with blood flow restriction (LLE-BFR) led to greater muscle strength gains (SMD=0.48, 95% CI 0.32 to 0.65) and pain reduction (SMD=-0.50, 95% CI -0.76 to -0.24) compared to low-load exercise (LLE) alone, with similar effects on muscle strength compared to high-load exercise (HLE) (SMD= -0.05, 95% CI -0.16 to 0.05).
items.curatedReason: 关于血流限制训练（BFR）与常规训练在肌肉骨骼康复中的对比，这篇综述指出，BFR在提升肌肉力量和减少疼痛方面可能优于低负荷训练（LLE），且与高负荷训练（HLE）效果相似。考虑将BFR作为LLE的强化选项，尤其是在HLE不适用的情况下。
items.titleZh: 血流限制训练在肌肉骨骼康复中是否比传统训练有额外益处？一项系统综述和Meta分析
items.summaryZh: 一项RCTs的系统综述和Meta分析发现，低负荷血流限制训练（LLE-BFR）在肌肉骨骼疾病患者中，相比单独低负荷训练（LLE）能带来更大的肌肉力量提升（SMD=0.48）和疼痛减轻（SMD=-0.50），且与高负荷训练（HLE）在肌肉力量方面效果相似（SMD=-0.05）。
items.curatedReasonEn: This review on blood flow restriction (BFR) training vs. conventional exercise in MSK rehab indicates BFR may be superior to low-load exercise (LLE) for muscle strength and pain reduction, and similar to high-load exercise (HLE). Consider BFR as an enhanced option over LLE, especially when HLE is contraindicated.
items.limitation: 原始研究的异质性较高。
items.limitationEn: The original studies exhibit high heterogeneity.

items.title: Frontline agreement in diagnosis and treatment for musculoskeletal dysfunctions. A prospective, randomized, controlled study.
items.summary: A randomized controlled trial (N=105) compared agreement in diagnosis, treatment, and discharge decisions between physiotherapists and resident physicians against senior physicians for non-urgent musculoskeletal conditions in an emergency department. The study found high agreement, supporting Advanced Physiotherapy Practice (APP) roles.
items.curatedReason: 本研究支持高级物理治疗实践（APP）模式在急诊科诊断和治疗非紧急肌肉骨骼疾病中的有效性。若你在考虑拓展执业范围或推进PT在急诊分诊中的作用，这项研究提供了有力的支持证据。
items.titleZh: 肌肉骨骼功能障碍的诊断和治疗一线协议：一项前瞻性、随机对照研究
items.summaryZh: 一项随机对照试验（N=105）在急诊科对非紧急肌肉骨骼疾病的诊断、治疗和出院决策中，比较了物理治疗师和住院医师与资深医师的一致性。研究发现高度一致，支持高级物理治疗实践（APP）模式。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study supports the effectiveness of Advanced Physiotherapy Practice (APP) roles in diagnosing and treating non-urgent musculoskeletal conditions in emergency departments. If you are considering expanding your scope of practice or advocating for PTs in ED triage, this study offers strong supporting evidence.
items.limitation: 研究在单一医院的急诊科进行，外推性受限。
items.limitationEn: The study was conducted in a single hospital ED, limiting generalizability.

items.title: Development of a Core Patient-Reported Outcome (Measures) Set for Pediatric Physical Therapy.
items.summary: Researchers developed a core set of 9 patient-reported outcomes (PROs) and corresponding measures (PROMs) for pediatric physical therapy, grouped into three domains: functioning (physical, emotional, social), health status, and symptoms (pain, fatigue, sleep). This set is suitable for daily practice, research, and quality assessment.
items.curatedReason: 这份报告为儿科物理治疗制定了核心患者报告结局（PROs）及其测量工具（PROMs）。如果你在儿科实践中需要标准化评估工具，这份核心集能帮你规范临床实践和研究，并为疗效评估提供依据。
items.titleZh: 儿科物理治疗核心患者报告结局（测量）集的开发
items.summaryZh: 研究人员为儿科物理治疗开发了一套包含9个核心患者报告结局（PROs）及其相应测量工具（PROMs）的集合，分为三个领域：功能（身体、情绪、社交）、健康状况和症状（疼痛、疲劳、睡眠）。该集合适用于日常实践、研究和质量评估。
items.curatedReasonEn: This report establishes a core set of patient-reported outcomes (PROs) and measures (PROMs) for pediatric physical therapy. If you require standardized assessment tools in your pediatric practice, this core set can help standardize clinical practice, research, and provide a basis for efficacy evaluation.
items.limitation: 核心集的开发依赖于专家组和调查，可能存在主观性。
items.limitationEn: The development of the core set relied on expert panels and surveys, which may introduce subjectivity.
items.journal: Pediatric physical therapy : the official publication of the Section on Pediatrics of the American Physical Therapy Association

items.title: APTA Report Finds Demand for Pelvic Health Physical Therapy Outpaces Access | APTA
items.summary: A new APTA report, "APTA State of Pelvic Health Physical Therapy," reveals that demand for pelvic health physical therapy in the U.S. significantly outpaces access, identifying key challenges in workforce, access, and awareness.
items.curatedReason: APTA的报告揭示了美国盆底健康物理治疗供不应求的现状，并指出了劳动力、可及性和意识方面的挑战。如果你从事盆底健康PT，这证实了你的专业需求，并为你争取执业范围扩大或政策支持提供了依据。
items.titleZh: APTA报告：盆底健康物理治疗需求超出美国可及性
items.summaryZh: APTA新报告《APTA盆底健康物理治疗现状》显示，美国盆底健康物理治疗的需求显著超出可及性，指出了劳动力、可及性和意识方面的主要挑战。
items.curatedReasonEn: APTA's report highlights the unmet demand for pelvic health physical therapy in the U.S., identifying workforce, access, and awareness challenges. If you are in pelvic health PT, this affirms the demand for your specialty and provides grounds to advocate for expanded scope of practice or policy support.

items.summary: A systematic review and meta-analysis evaluated the impact of postpartum exercise on pelvic floor disorders and diastasis recti abdominis. It found that exercise positively influences the recovery and prevention of these conditions.
items.curatedReason: 这项系统综述和Meta分析强调了产后运动对盆底功能障碍和腹直肌分离的积极影响。在为产后女性制定康复计划时，将其作为核心干预措施，并确保方案的证据基础。
items.titleZh: 产后运动对盆底功能障碍和腹直肌分离的影响：一项系统综述和Meta分析
items.summaryZh: 一项系统综述和Meta分析评估了产后运动对盆底功能障碍和腹直肌分离的影响。研究发现运动对这些疾病的恢复和预防有积极作用。
items.curatedReasonEn: This systematic review and meta-analysis highlights the positive impact of postpartum exercise on pelvic floor disorders and diastasis recti abdominis. Incorporate it as a core intervention when developing rehabilitation plans for postpartum women, ensuring evidence-based protocols.
items.limitation: 部分研究可能存在方法学异质性，影响结果的普适性。
items.limitationEn: Some included studies may have methodological heterogeneity, affecting generalizability.

items.title: Consensus practice guidelines on interventions for cervical spine ...
items.summary: A multispecialty international working group developed consensus practice guidelines on interventions for cervical spine (facet) joint pain, providing updated recommendations for clinicians.
items.curatedReason: 这是一份关于颈椎关节痛干预措施的共识实践指南。如果你在处理颈椎相关疼痛病例，这份多学科国际共识能为你的评估和治疗选择提供标准化参考。
items.titleZh: 颈椎（小关节）关节痛干预措施的共识实践指南
items.summaryZh: 一个多学科国际工作组制定了关于颈椎（小关节）关节痛干预措施的共识实践指南，为临床医生提供了更新的建议。
items.curatedReasonEn: This is a consensus practice guideline on interventions for cervical spine facet joint pain. If you manage cervical spine-related pain cases, this multispecialty international consensus can provide a standardized reference for your assessment and treatment choices.

items.title: A Multicenter Randomized Pragmatic Trial Comparing Intra-Articular Injection, Genicular Nerve Block, and Radiofrequency Ablation for Knee Osteoarthritis Pain: SKOAP Phase 2 Protocol
items.summary: The SKOAP Phase 2 Protocol describes a multicenter randomized pragmatic trial comparing intra-articular injection, genicular nerve block, and radiofrequency ablation for knee osteoarthritis pain, aiming to address limited comparative evidence for procedural interventions.
items.curatedReason: 这份SKOAP Phase 2协议描述了一项多中心随机试验，比较了膝骨关节炎疼痛的关节内注射、膝关节神经阻滞和射频消融术。如果你在处理膝骨关节炎患者，这项研究的进展将影响你对介入治疗的转诊决策。
items.titleZh: 多中心随机实用试验比较膝骨关节炎疼痛的关节内注射、膝关节神经阻滞和射频消融术：SKOAP 2期方案
items.summaryZh: SKOAP 2期方案描述了一项多中心随机实用试验，旨在比较膝骨关节炎疼痛的关节内注射、膝关节神经阻滞和射频消融术，以解决介入治疗比较证据有限的问题。
items.curatedReasonEn: This SKOAP Phase 2 protocol describes a multicenter randomized trial comparing intra-articular injection, genicular nerve block, and radiofrequency ablation for knee osteoarthritis pain. If you manage knee OA patients, the progress of this study will influence your referral decisions for interventional treatments.

items.title: Use of Extracorporeal Shockwave Therapy for the Management of Bone Pathologies: A Systematic Review
items.summary: A systematic review of 3 databases (Cochrane, Embase, PubMed) evaluated the efficacy of extracorporeal shockwave therapy (ESWT) for bone pathologies, including fractures, osteonecrosis/avascular necrosis, bone stress injury, medial tibial stress syndrome, and bone marrow edema syndrome, across various study designs.
items.curatedReason: 这项系统综述评估了体外冲击波疗法（ESWT）在骨病理学管理中的疗效，包括骨折、骨坏死和应力性损伤。如果你在处理这类骨科病例，可以参考其在这些特定病症中的应用证据。
items.titleZh: 体外冲击波疗法在骨病理学管理中的应用：一项系统综述
items.summaryZh: 一项对3个数据库进行的系统综述评估了体外冲击波疗法（ESWT）在骨病理学管理中的疗效，包括骨折、骨坏死/缺血性坏死、骨应力损伤、胫骨内侧应力综合征和骨髓水肿综合征，涵盖了多种研究设计。
items.curatedReasonEn: This systematic review evaluates the efficacy of extracorporeal shockwave therapy (ESWT) in managing bone pathologies, including fractures, osteonecrosis, and stress injuries. If you are handling such orthopedic cases, you can refer to its evidence for application in these specific conditions.
items.limitation: 综述纳入的研究设计多样（包括RCT、队列、病例报告），证据等级存在异质性。
items.limitationEn: The review includes diverse study designs (RCTs, cohort, case reports), leading to heterogeneity in evidence levels.

items.title: Comparative Outcomes of Circumferential Versus Segmental Labral Reconstruction in Hip Arthroscopy: A Systematic Review and Meta-analysis
items.summary: A systematic review and meta-analysis compared patient-reported outcomes, complications, and reoperation rates between segmental and circumferential labral reconstruction in hip arthroscopy. The study aims to clarify which technique offers superior clinical outcomes for irreparable acetabular labral pathology.
items.curatedReason: 这项Meta分析比较了髋关节镜下盂唇环形与节段性重建的结局。如果你在评估髋关节盂唇损伤患者的术式选择，该研究为你提供了不同重建技术的疗效、并发症和再手术率的对比证据，有助于你与患者和骨科医生沟通。
items.titleZh: 髋关节镜下环形与节段性盂唇重建的比较结局：一项系统综述和Meta分析
items.summaryZh: 一项系统综述和Meta分析比较了髋关节镜下节段性与环形盂唇重建的患者报告结局、并发症和再手术率。该研究旨在明确哪种技术对不可修复的髋臼盂唇病理提供更优的临床结局。
items.curatedReasonEn: This meta-analysis compares outcomes of circumferential vs. segmental labral reconstruction in hip arthroscopy. If you are evaluating surgical options for hip labral tears, this study provides comparative evidence on efficacy, complications, and reoperation rates for different reconstruction techniques, aiding communication with patients and orthopedic surgeons.
items.limitation: 纳入研究可能存在异质性，影响结果的普适性。
items.limitationEn: The included studies may exhibit heterogeneity, affecting the generalizability of the results.

items.title: Rehabilitation of Long-Standing Groin Pain in Athletes: A Scoping Review of Exercise Content and Reporting | Journal of Orthopaedic & Sports Physical Therapy
items.summary: A scoping review systematically summarized the exercise content and reporting in the rehabilitation of long-standing groin pain in athletes, identifying key exercise components and reporting practices across the literature.
items.curatedReason: 这项范围综述系统地总结了运动员慢性腹股沟疼痛康复中的运动内容和报告。如果你在处理运动性腹股沟痛，这份综述可以帮你了解当前证据支持的运动干预类型，从而优化你的康复方案。
items.titleZh: 运动员慢性腹股沟疼痛的康复：运动内容与报告的范围综述
items.summaryZh: 一项范围综述系统总结了运动员慢性腹股沟疼痛康复中的运动内容和报告，识别了文献中关键的运动组成部分和报告实践。
items.curatedReasonEn: This scoping review systematically summarizes exercise content and reporting in the rehabilitation of long-standing groin pain in athletes. If you manage sports-related groin pain, this review can help you understand the types of exercise interventions supported by current evidence, thereby optimizing your rehabilitation protocols.
items.limitation: 范围综述旨在映射文献，而非评估证据质量，因此不能直接作为高等级证据指导临床实践。
items.limitationEn: A scoping review aims to map the literature rather than assess evidence quality, thus it cannot directly guide clinical practice as high-level evidence.

items.title: Hip Arthroscopic Labral Repair for Femoroacetabular Impingement Yields High Return-to-Sport Rates and Improved Outcomes in Basketball Players
items.summary: A study evaluating 2009-2022 data found that hip arthroscopic labral repair for femoroacetabular impingement in active basketball players resulted in high return-to-sport rates (87%) and improved patient-reported outcome measures (mHHS 87.2, HOS-ADL 94.6, HOS-SS 89.2) at a minimum 2-year follow-up.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究显示，髋关节镜下盂唇修复术能使篮球运动员获得较高的重返运动率和改善的患者报告结局。如果你在为有髋关节撞击症状的篮球运动员制定术后康复计划，这为你提供了积极的预后信息，指导你设定重返运动目标。
items.titleZh: 髋关节镜下盂唇修复术治疗股骨髋臼撞击使篮球运动员获得高重返运动率和改善的结局
items.summaryZh: 一项评估2009-2022年数据的研究发现，对患有股骨髋臼撞击的活跃篮球运动员进行髋关节镜下盂唇修复术，在至少2年的随访中，取得了高重返运动率（87%）和改善的患者报告结局（mHHS 87.2，HOS-ADL 94.6，HOS-SS 89.2）。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study shows that hip arthroscopic labral repair yields high return-to-sport rates and improved patient-reported outcomes in basketball players. If you are developing a post-operative rehabilitation plan for basketball players with hip impingement, this provides positive prognostic information to guide your return-to-sport goals.
items.limitation: 研究是回顾性队列研究，且仅限于篮球运动员，外推性有限。
items.limitationEn: The study is a retrospective cohort study and limited to basketball players, thus generalizability is limited.

items.title: Treadmill training with rhythmic auditory cueing and/or visual feedback for persons with Multiple Sclerosis: feasibility and effects on gait parameters in a clinical randomized controlled trial | medRxiv
items.summary: A randomized controlled trial evaluated the feasibility and effects of treadmill training (TT) with visual feedback (VF) and TT with VF plus rhythmic auditory cueing (RAC) on gait parameters in persons with Multiple Sclerosis. Both interventions were found feasible and showed positive effects on gait.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究表明，带有视觉反馈和/或节律听觉提示的跑台训练在多发性硬化症患者的步态参数改善上是可行的。这为神经康复中的步态训练提供了新的技术辅助方向，你可以考虑在临床实践中探索其应用。
items.titleZh: 多发性硬化症患者采用节律听觉提示和/或视觉反馈的跑台训练：临床随机对照试验的可行性及对步态参数的影响
items.summaryZh: 一项随机对照试验评估了带有视觉反馈（VF）和VF加节律听觉提示（RAC）的跑台训练在多发性硬化症患者中对步态参数的可行性及效果。研究发现两种干预措施均可行，并对步态产生积极影响。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study indicates that treadmill training with visual feedback and/or rhythmic auditory cueing is feasible and effective for improving gait parameters in persons with Multiple Sclerosis. This offers new technology-assisted directions for gait training in neurorehabilitation; consider exploring its application in clinical practice.
items.limitation: 这是一项初步的可行性研究，样本量较小，长期效果和更大规模验证仍需进一步研究。
items.limitationEn: This is a preliminary feasibility study with a small sample size; long-term effects and larger-scale validation require further research.

items.title: Digital Simulation-Based Ultrasound Training for Physiotherapy Students: Prospective Randomized Controlled Trial
items.summary: A prospective randomized blinded study (N=68 physiotherapy students) found that a simulation-based online ultrasound platform was as effective as traditional on-site training for physiotherapy students, with both groups completing identical theoretical and practical assessments.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究显示，数字模拟超声训练平台与传统现场教学对物理治疗学生的教学效果相当。如果你在考虑引入远程或数字化教学工具，这项研究支持其在超声教育中的应用潜力。
items.titleZh: 物理治疗学生数字模拟超声训练：前瞻性随机对照试验
items.summaryZh: 一项前瞻性随机盲法研究（N=68名物理治疗学生）发现，数字模拟在线超声训练平台与传统现场教学对物理治疗学生同样有效，两组均完成了相同的理论和实践评估。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study indicates that digital simulation-based ultrasound training is as effective as traditional on-site instruction for physiotherapy students. If you are considering integrating remote or digital teaching tools, this research supports its potential application in ultrasound education.
items.limitation: 研究关注的是学生学习效果，而非临床操作技能的长期转移和患者结局。
items.limitationEn: The study focuses on student learning outcomes, not the long-term transfer of clinical skills or patient outcomes.

items.title: Intravaginal dehydroepiandrosterone for the treatment of vulvovaginal atrophy: a systematic review and meta-analysis
items.summary: A systematic review and meta-analysis of studies up to July 2025 confirmed the therapeutic efficacy of intravaginal dehydroepiandrosterone (DHEA) for vulvovaginal atrophy in postmenopausal women, showing improvements in vaginal dryness, dyspareunia, and quality of life.
items.curatedReason: 这项系统综述证实了阴道内脱氢表雄酮（DHEA）对绝经后妇女外阴阴道萎缩（VVA）的治疗效果。若你的患者群体中有绝经后女性，可将其作为评估VVA症状的潜在治疗选项，并转诊至相关专科医师进行药物管理。
items.titleZh: 阴道内脱氢表雄酮治疗外阴阴道萎缩：一项系统综述和Meta分析
items.summaryZh: 一项截至2025年7月的系统综述和Meta分析证实了阴道内脱氢表雄酮（DHEA）对绝经后妇女外阴阴道萎缩的治疗效果，显示阴道干燥、性交困难和生活质量均有改善。
items.curatedReasonEn: This systematic review confirms the therapeutic efficacy of intravaginal dehydroepiandrosterone (DHEA) for vulvovaginal atrophy (VVA) in postmenopausal women. If your patient population includes postmenopausal women, consider this as a potential treatment option for VVA symptoms, and refer to relevant specialists for medication management.
items.limitation: 研究未详细说明药物治疗与物理治疗结合的效果。
items.limitationEn: The study does not detail the effects of combining pharmaceutical treatment with physical therapy.

items.title: ChainBMD: A deep learning framework for stroke evaluation and guidance using kinetic chain graphs and temporal analysis - ScienceDirect
items.summary: Researchers developed ChainBMD, a deep learning framework for stroke evaluation and guidance using kinetic chain graphs and temporal analysis. It aims to improve human motion evaluation and provide training guidance through interpretable wearable sensing.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究提出了一个基于深度学习的卒中评估和指导框架ChainBMD，利用运动链图和时间分析。如果你对智能康复技术和客观评估方法感兴趣，这为卒中患者的运动评估和训练提供了新的视角。
items.titleZh: ChainBMD：一个利用运动链图和时间分析进行卒中评估与指导的深度学习框架
items.summaryZh: 研究人员开发了ChainBMD，一个利用运动链图和时间分析进行卒中评估和指导的深度学习框架。它旨在通过可解释的穿戴式传感来改进人体运动评估并提供训练指导。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study introduces ChainBMD, a deep learning framework for stroke evaluation and guidance using kinetic chain graphs and temporal analysis. If you are interested in intelligent rehabilitation technologies and objective assessment methods, this offers a new perspective on motor evaluation and training for stroke patients.
items.limitation: 作为深度学习框架的初步研究，其在真实临床环境中的泛化性和长期有效性尚待验证。
items.limitationEn: As a preliminary study of a deep learning framework, its generalizability and long-term effectiveness in real clinical settings still need to be validated.

items.title: Branched-chain amino acids alleviate Parkinson’s neurodegeneration via microbial propionate-dependent restoration of the PI3K/Akt/mTORC1 axis - ScienceDirect
items.summary: This research explored how branched-chain amino acids (BCAAs) alleviate Parkinson’s neurodegeneration via microbial propionate-dependent restoration of the PI3K/Akt/mTORC1 axis, highlighting the gut–brain axis in Parkinson's disease pathogenesis.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究探讨了支链氨基酸（BCAAs）通过肠道微生物丙酸盐依赖的PI3K/Akt/mTORC1通路来缓解帕金森病神经退行性病变。作为物理治疗师，理解帕金森病的多系统影响（包括肠脑轴），有助于你更全面地考虑患者的整体健康状况，并与其他医疗专业人员协作。
items.titleZh: 支链氨基酸通过微生物丙酸盐依赖的PI3K/Akt/mTORC1轴恢复来缓解帕金森病神经退行性变
items.summaryZh: 这项研究探讨了支链氨基酸（BCAAs）如何通过微生物丙酸盐依赖的PI3K/Akt/mTORC1轴恢复来缓解帕金森病神经退行性变，强调了肠脑轴在帕金森病发病机制中的作用。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study investigates how branched-chain amino acids (BCAAs) alleviate Parkinson's neurodegeneration via microbial propionate-dependent PI3K/Akt/mTORC1 axis. As a physical therapist, understanding the multi-system impact of Parkinson's disease (including the gut-brain axis) helps you consider patients' overall health more comprehensively and collaborate better with other healthcare professionals.
items.limitation: 这是一项机制研究，主要针对帕金森病神经退行性病变的分子通路，尚未直接涉及临床康复干预。
items.limitationEn: This is a mechanistic study, primarily focusing on molecular pathways of Parkinson's neurodegeneration, and does not directly involve clinical rehabilitation interventions.

items.title: [Relationship between the consistency of auxiliary provocation tests with the supine roll test and treatment outcomes for horizontal semicircular canal benign paroxysmal positional vertigo]
items.summary: This study investigated the relationship between the consistency of auxiliary provocation tests with the supine roll test and treatment outcomes for horizontal semicircular canal benign paroxysmal positional vertigo (HSC-BPPV).
items.curatedReason: 这项研究探讨了辅助性激发试验与仰卧滚转试验在水平半规管良性阵发性位置性眩晕（HSC-BPPV）中的一致性及其与治疗结局的关系。如果你在诊断和治疗眩晕症，这项研究提供了关于HSC-BPPV诊断准确性和预后预测的见解，指导你的手法操作选择。
items.titleZh: 辅助性激发试验与仰卧滚转试验在水平半规管良性阵发性位置性眩晕中的一致性及其与治疗结局的关系
items.summaryZh: 这项研究调查了辅助性激发试验与仰卧滚转试验在水平半规管良性阵发性位置性眩晕（HSC-BPPV）中的一致性及其与治疗结局的关系。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study explores the consistency between auxiliary provocation tests and the supine roll test in horizontal semicircular canal benign paroxysmal positional vertigo (HSC-BPPV) and its relationship with treatment outcomes. If you diagnose and treat vertigo, this study offers insights into diagnostic accuracy and prognostic prediction for HSC-BPPV, guiding your manual technique choices.
items.limitation: 研究未指明具体研究设计，可能存在观察性研究的局限性。
items.limitationEn: The specific study design is not specified, potentially carrying limitations inherent to observational studies.

items.title: Risk Factors for Musculoskeletal Injuries in Military Recruits: The Impact of Sex, Body Fat Percentage, and Physical Fitness
items.summary: A prospective interventional study investigated the incidence of musculoskeletal symptoms and injuries in male and female recruits during sixteen weeks of Brazilian Marine Basic Military Training, and assessed the impact of sex, body fat percentage, and physical fitness as risk factors.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究探讨了军事新兵肌肉骨骼损伤的风险因素，特别是性别、体脂百分比和体能的影响。如果你在运动人群中工作，特别是涉及高强度训练或特定性别差异的群体，这能帮助你识别高风险个体，并制定更具针对性的预防策略。
items.titleZh: 军事新兵肌肉骨骼损伤的风险因素：性别、体脂百分比和体能的影响
items.summaryZh: 一项前瞻性干预研究调查了巴西海军基础军事训练16周期间男女新兵肌肉骨骼症状和损伤的发生率，并评估了性别、体脂百分比和体能作为风险因素的影响。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study investigates risk factors for musculoskeletal injuries in military recruits, particularly the impact of sex, body fat percentage, and physical fitness. If you work with athletic populations, especially those involved in high-intensity training or with specific sex differences, this can help you identify high-risk individuals and develop more targeted prevention strategies.
items.limitation: 研究对象是军事新兵，其损伤模式和风险因素可能不完全适用于一般运动人群。
items.limitationEn: The study subjects are military recruits, whose injury patterns and risk factors may not be fully generalizable to the general athletic population.

items.title: Single leg vertical jump performance identifies knee function deficits ...
items.summary: This original research highlights that single-leg vertical jump performance can identify knee function deficits at return to sport after ACL reconstruction in male athletes, providing a critical objective measure for readiness.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究强调了单腿垂直跳表现能识别男性运动员ACL重建后重返运动时的膝关节功能缺陷。如果你在评估ACL术后患者的重返运动准备情况，应将单腿垂直跳作为关键评估指标之一，以更客观地判断膝关节功能对称性。
items.titleZh: 单腿垂直跳表现可识别男性运动员ACL重建后重返运动时的膝关节功能缺陷
items.summaryZh: 这项原创研究强调，单腿垂直跳表现可以识别男性运动员ACL重建后重返运动时的膝关节功能缺陷，为判断重返运动准备情况提供了一个关键的客观测量指标。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study emphasizes that single-leg vertical jump performance can identify knee function deficits in male athletes returning to sport after ACL reconstruction. If you are assessing readiness for return-to-sport in post-ACL patients, include single-leg vertical jump as a key assessment metric to objectively evaluate knee functional symmetry.
items.limitation: 研究对象仅限于男性运动员，结果不一定适用于女性或其他人群。
items.limitationEn: The study subjects were limited to male athletes, and the results may not be generalizable to females or other populations.

items.title: Progressing rehabilitation after injury: consider the 'control-chaos ...
items.summary: This article proposes considering the 'control-chaos continuum' when progressing rehabilitation after injury, advocating for a nuanced approach to re-integrating athletes into training and match play while balancing reinjury risk and performance optimization.
items.curatedReason: 这篇文章提出了“控制-混沌连续体”的概念，用于指导损伤后康复进展和重返运动。如果你在制定运动员康复方案，可以采纳这个框架，渐进式地引入混沌元素，以更好地模拟运动环境，降低再损伤风险。
items.titleZh: 损伤后康复进展：考虑“控制-混沌连续体”
items.summaryZh: 这篇文章提出在损伤后康复进展中考虑“控制-混沌连续体”，主张在将运动员重新整合到训练和比赛中时，采用一种细致入微的方法，平衡再损伤风险与表现优化。
items.curatedReasonEn: This article introduces the 'control-chaos continuum' concept for guiding rehabilitation progression and return-to-sport after injury. If you are developing rehabilitation protocols for athletes, adopt this framework to progressively introduce chaotic elements, better simulating sports environments and reducing re-injury risk.
items.limitation: 这是一篇观点文章，而非基于新的研究数据，其指导意义需结合实践经验进行判断。
items.limitationEn: This is a perspective article, not based on new research data; its guidance should be evaluated in conjunction with practical experience.

items.title: Advances in research on the role of VEGF family members in ischemic stroke - ScienceDirect
items.summary: This review article summarizes advances in research on the role of VEGF family members in ischemic stroke, highlighting their dual roles in ischemic stroke and cerebral ischemia/reperfusion injury, and their potential in promoting angiogenesis and neuroprotection.
items.curatedReason: 这篇综述探讨了VEGF家族成员在缺血性卒中中的作用进展，提示了神经保护和血管生成的潜在机制。作为物理治疗师，了解这些基础科学进展，能帮助你理解卒中后生理恢复的潜在靶点，并与医疗团队更好地协作。
items.titleZh: VEGF家族成员在缺血性卒中中作用研究进展
items.summaryZh: 这篇综述文章总结了VEGF家族成员在缺血性卒中中作用的研究进展，强调了其在缺血性卒中和脑缺血/再灌注损伤中的双重作用，以及在促进血管生成和神经保护方面的潜力。
items.curatedReasonEn: This review discusses advancements in understanding the role of VEGF family members in ischemic stroke, suggesting potential mechanisms for neuroprotection and angiogenesis. As a physical therapist, understanding these basic science advancements can help you grasp potential targets for physiological recovery post-stroke and collaborate more effectively with the medical team.
items.limitation: 这是一篇综述文章，主要基于现有研究的总结，不提供新的临床数据。
items.limitationEn: This is a review article, primarily summarizing existing research, and does not provide new clinical data.

items.title: How does exercise dose affect patients with long-term osteoarthritis ...
items.summary: This study protocol outlines the SWENOR Study, a randomized controlled trial in Sweden and Norway, investigating how exercise dose affects patients with long-term osteoarthritis of the knee.
items.curatedReason: 这份研究协议描述了一项关于运动剂量如何影响长期膝骨关节炎患者的随机对照试验（SWENOR 研究）。如果你关注运动处方在骨关节炎管理中的优化，这将是一项值得关注的未来研究。
items.titleZh: 运动剂量如何影响长期膝骨关节炎患者？一项在瑞典和挪威进行的随机对照试验研究协议：SWENOR 研究
items.summaryZh: 这份研究协议概述了SWENOR研究，这是一项在瑞典和挪威进行的随机对照试验，旨在探讨运动剂量如何影响长期膝骨关节炎患者。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study protocol outlines a randomized controlled trial (SWENOR Study) on how exercise dose affects patients with long-term knee osteoarthritis. If you are focused on optimizing exercise prescriptions in osteoarthritis management, this will be a future study to watch.

items.title: Efficacy of Tuina in chronic low back pain with anxiety - BMJ Open
items.summary: This is a study protocol for a randomized controlled trial investigating the efficacy of Tuina in treating chronic low back pain with anxiety.
items.curatedReason: 这份研究协议描述了一项关于推拿（Tuina）治疗伴焦虑的慢性腰痛的随机对照试验。如果你对结合传统疗法和心理因素的干预感兴趣，可以关注这项研究的最终结果。
items.titleZh: 推拿治疗伴焦虑慢性腰痛的疗效：一项随机对照试验的研究方案
items.summaryZh: 这是一项随机对照试验的研究方案，旨在调查推拿治疗伴焦虑的慢性腰痛的疗效。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study protocol outlines a randomized controlled trial on the efficacy of Tuina for chronic low back pain with anxiety. If you are interested in interventions combining traditional therapy with psychological factors, you might follow the eventual results of this study.

items.title: Teriparatide as an Adjunct in Managing Delayed Union of Long Bone Fractures: Insights from a Tertiary Care Center
items.summary: A prospective interventional study on 48 adult patients with delayed union of long bone fractures evaluated the efficacy and safety of teriparatide (recombinant human parathyroid hormone) in promoting fracture healing, suggesting its promise as a biological enhancer of bone healing.
items.curatedReason: 这项前瞻性干预研究旨在评估特立帕肽作为长骨骨折延迟愈合的辅助治疗效果。虽然特立帕肽是药物干预，但其对骨愈合的影响间接关系到康复进程，关注这类药物进展，可更好地与医生协同管理患者。
items.titleZh: 特立帕肽作为长骨骨折延迟愈合辅助治疗的见解：来自三级医疗中心的研究
items.summaryZh: 一项针对48名长骨骨折延迟愈合成年患者的前瞻性干预研究评估了特立帕肽（重组人甲状旁腺激素）在促进骨折愈合方面的疗效和安全性，提示其作为骨愈合生物增强剂的潜力。
items.curatedReasonEn: This prospective interventional study aims to evaluate teriparatide as an adjunct for delayed union of long bone fractures. While teriparatide is a pharmaceutical intervention, its impact on bone healing is indirectly related to the rehabilitation process. Staying informed on such drug advancements allows for better collaborative patient management with physicians.
items.limitation: 研究对象仅限于单一中心的48名患者，样本量小且外推性有限。
items.limitationEn: The study is limited to 48 patients from a single center, with a small sample size and limited generalizability.

items.title: Thrombectomy for Pediatric Large Vessel Occlusion Stroke With Mild Presenting Symptoms
items.summary: A case-control study pooling data from 4 published cohorts aimed to determine if thrombectomy is associated with superior functional outcomes compared with medical management alone in pediatric patients with acute large vessel occlusion (LVO) stroke and mild presenting symptoms.
items.curatedReason: 这项针对儿童大血管闭塞性卒中的研究，探讨了血栓切除术在轻度症状患者中的益处。虽然卒中康复是你的核心工作，但了解神经介入治疗的最新进展和适应症，有助于你更早地识别潜在病例，并进行恰当转诊。
items.titleZh: 轻度症状表现的儿童大血管闭塞性卒中血栓切除术
items.summaryZh: 一项汇总了4个已发表队列数据的病例对照研究旨在确定血栓切除术在轻度症状表现的急性大血管闭塞性卒中儿童患者中，是否与单独药物治疗相比具有更优的功能结局。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study on pediatric large vessel occlusion stroke investigates the benefit of thrombectomy in patients with mild presenting symptoms. While stroke rehabilitation is your core work, understanding the latest advancements and indications in neurointerventional treatments helps you identify potential cases earlier and make appropriate referrals.
items.limitation: 这是一项病例对照研究，而非随机对照试验，存在选择偏倚的风险。
items.limitationEn: This is a case-control study, not a randomized clinical trial, carrying a risk of selection bias.

items.title: Efficacy of remote ischemic conditioning on cerebral blood flow regulation in patients with endovascular stenting: a randomized controlled trial | BMC Medicine | Springer Nature Link
items.summary: A randomized controlled trial investigated whether adjunctive remote ischemic conditioning (RIC) improves cerebral blood flow (CBF) regulation and reduces the risk of postoperative stroke in patients undergoing endovascular stenting for cerebrovascular stenosis.
items.curatedReason: 这项随机对照试验旨在评估远程缺血预处理（RIC）对脑血管支架置入术患者脑血流调节的疗效。虽然RIC是医疗干预，但了解其对脑血流改善的潜力，有助于你更好地理解和参与卒中预防和康复早期的跨学科管理。
items.titleZh: 远程缺血预处理对血管内支架置入术患者脑血流调节的疗效：一项随机对照试验
items.summaryZh: 一项随机对照试验旨在调查辅助性远程缺血预处理（RIC）是否能改善脑血管狭窄血管内支架置入术患者的脑血流（CBF）调节，并降低术后卒中风险。
items.curatedReasonEn: This randomized controlled trial aims to evaluate the efficacy of remote ischemic conditioning (RIC) on cerebral blood flow regulation in patients with endovascular stenting. While RIC is a medical intervention, understanding its potential for improving cerebral blood flow helps you better comprehend and participate in interdisciplinary management of stroke prevention and early rehabilitation.
items.limitation: 研究关注的是RIC对脑血流调节的短期生理效应，而非直接的临床功能结局。
items.limitationEn: The study focuses on the short-term physiological effects of RIC on cerebral blood flow regulation, not direct clinical functional outcomes.

items.title: Lipid metabolism, microglia, and stroke
items.summary: This review explores the new scope of microglia and lipids in immune regulation of stroke, discussing advances in microglia-lipid interaction and the implication of peripheral lipid metabolism after stroke. It highlights their important roles in post-stroke immunity.
items.curatedReason: 这篇综述探讨了脂质代谢、小胶质细胞与卒中之间的关系，揭示了卒中后免疫调节的新视角。作为物理治疗师，了解神经炎症和代谢因素在卒中病理生理中的作用，有助于你更全面地理解康复过程的生物学基础。
items.titleZh: 脂质代谢、小胶质细胞与卒中
items.summaryZh: 这篇综述探讨了小胶质细胞和脂质在卒中免疫调节中的新视角，讨论了小胶质细胞-脂质相互作用的进展以及卒中后外周脂质代谢的影响，强调了它们在卒中后免疫中的重要作用。
items.curatedReasonEn: This review explores the relationship between lipid metabolism, microglia, and stroke, revealing new perspectives on post-stroke immune regulation. As a physical therapist, understanding the role of neuroinflammation and metabolic factors in stroke pathophysiology helps you more comprehensively grasp the biological basis of the rehabilitation process.
items.limitation: 这是一篇综述文章，主要基于现有研究的总结，不提供新的临床干预数据。
items.limitationEn: This is a review article, primarily summarizing existing research, and does not provide new clinical intervention data.

items.title: Bouldering-related trauma: Injury patterns and operative burden over 10 years at a UK major trauma centre - ScienceDirect
items.summary: This study investigated bouldering-related trauma, analyzing injury patterns and operative burden over 10 years at a UK major trauma center. The findings characterize the types of injuries sustained in this popular climbing discipline.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究分析了抱石运动相关的创伤模式和手术负担。如果你关注运动损伤预防和康复，这能帮助你理解抱石运动的特异性风险，以便为参与者提供更精准的风险管理和康复建议。
items.titleZh: 抱石相关创伤：英国主要创伤中心10年间的损伤模式和手术负担
items.summaryZh: 这项研究调查了抱石相关创伤，分析了英国一家主要创伤中心在10年间抱石运动造成的损伤模式和手术负担。研究结果描述了这种流行攀岩运动中发生的损伤类型。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study analyzes bouldering-related trauma patterns and operative burden. If you focus on sports injury prevention and rehabilitation, this can help you understand the specific risks of bouldering to provide more precise risk management and rehabilitation advice to participants.
items.limitation: 这是一项回顾性研究，可能存在数据缺失或回忆偏倚。
items.limitationEn: This is a retrospective study, which may be subject to missing data or recall bias.

items.title: Physiotherapist-led treatment for femoroacetabular impingement syndrome (the PhysioFIRST study): an assessor-blinded, limited disclosure randomised controlled trial
items.summary: The PhysioFIRST study, an assessor-blinded RCT, found physiotherapist-led targeted strengthening (STRENGTH) and standardized stretching (STRETCH) similarly improved hip-related quality of life and patient-perceived Global Rating of Change at 6 months for femoroacetabular impingement syndrome.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究显示，物理治疗师主导的靶向强化训练与标准化牵伸对股骨髋臼撞击综合征的疗效相似，都显著改善患者生活质量。这意味着在临床实践中，你可以根据患者具体情况和偏好灵活选择这两种方法。
items.titleZh: 物理治疗师主导的股骨髋臼撞击综合征治疗（PhysioFIRST研究）：一项评估者盲法、有限披露的随机对照试验
items.summaryZh: PhysioFIRST研究是一项评估者盲法随机对照试验，发现物理治疗师主导的靶向强化训练（STRENGTH）和标准化牵伸（STRETCH）在股骨髋臼撞击综合征患者中，对髋关节相关生活质量和患者感知整体变化评分的改善在6个月时相似。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study shows that physiotherapist-led targeted strengthening and standardized stretching offer similar efficacy for femoroacetabular impingement syndrome, both significantly improving patient quality of life. This means you can flexibly choose between these two approaches in clinical practice based on patient specifics and preferences.
items.limitation: 研究随访时间为6个月，需要更长的随访来评估长期疗效。
items.limitationEn: The study had a 6-month follow-up, and longer follow-up is needed to assess long-term efficacy.

items.title: Comparative effectiveness of physical therapy interventions in adults with rotator cuff tendinopathy: a systematic review and network meta-analysis
items.summary: A systematic review and network meta-analysis compared physical therapy interventions for rotator cuff tendinopathy, aiming to identify the most effective intervention for pain, function, quality of life (QoL), and adverse events (AEs).
items.curatedReason: 这项网络Meta分析对肩袖肌腱病的不同物理治疗干预措施进行了比较，为你提供了选择最有效治疗方案的证据。在临床实践中，应优先选择在疼痛、功能和生活质量方面显示出更优效果的干预。
items.titleZh: 成人肩袖肌腱病物理治疗干预的比较效果：一项系统综述和网络Meta分析
items.summaryZh: 一项系统综述和网络Meta分析比较了成人肩袖肌腱病的不同物理治疗干预措施，旨在确定对疼痛、功能、生活质量（QoL）和不良事件（AEs）最有效的干预。
items.curatedReasonEn: This network meta-analysis compares different physical therapy interventions for rotator cuff tendinopathy, providing you with evidence to select the most effective treatment. In clinical practice, prioritize interventions that show superior outcomes in pain, function, and quality of life.
items.limitation: 网络Meta分析的结果可能受到纳入研究异质性和间接比较的限制，需要谨慎解读。
items.limitationEn: The results of network meta-analysis may be limited by heterogeneity and indirect comparisons among included studies, requiring cautious interpretation.

items.title: Improved Flexor Spasticity in Patients with Chronic Stroke Using a Dynamic Wrist-Hand Stretching Device: A Pilot Randomized Controlled Trial.
items.summary: A pilot RCT (n=30) found that a novel dynamic wrist-hand stretching device (Hand Stretcher®) improved flexor spasticity and hand function in chronic stroke patients, suggesting its potential for long-term management.
items.curatedReason: 这款动态腕手牵伸器在慢性卒中患者腕手痉挛管理中显示出潜力，特别适用于居家或门诊长期辅助治疗。别替代主动运动，当成现有方案的有效补充。
items.titleZh: 动态腕手牵伸器改善慢性卒中患者屈肌痉挛：一项初步随机对照试验
items.summaryZh: 一项纳入 30 名慢性卒中患者的初步随机对照试验发现，一款新型动态腕手牵伸器（Hand Stretcher®）能改善屈肌痉挛并提升手功能，提示其在长期管理中的潜力。
items.curatedReasonEn: This dynamic wrist-hand stretching device shows potential in managing wrist and hand spasticity in chronic stroke patients, especially for long-term home or outpatient care. Do not replace active movement; consider it an effective adjunct to existing protocols.
items.limitation: 这是一项小样本试点RCT，需要更大规模的研究来验证其长期疗效和普适性。
items.limitationEn: This is a small-sample pilot RCT, and larger studies are needed to validate its long-term efficacy and generalizability.

items.title: Efficacy and Modulating Factors of Repetitive Transcranial Magnetic Stimulation on Motor Function in Parkinson's Disease: A Meta-Analysis.
items.summary: A meta-analysis evaluated the short-term and long-term therapeutic effects of repetitive transcranial magnetic stimulation (rTMS) on motor function in Parkinson's disease (PD), finding rTMS effective in the short term, with variable modulating factors.
items.curatedReason: rTMS对帕金森病运动功能短期改善的证据逐渐扎实，但长期效果和最佳参数仍不明确。考虑将其作为辅助手段，别指望它单枪匹马解决问题。
items.titleZh: 重复经颅磁刺激对帕金森病运动功能的疗效及调节因素：一项Meta分析
items.summaryZh: 一项Meta分析评估了重复经颅磁刺激（rTMS）对帕金森病（PD）患者运动功能的短期和长期疗效，发现rTMS在短期内有效，但调节因素具有可变性。
items.curatedReasonEn: Evidence for short-term motor function improvement with rTMS in Parkinson's disease is growing, but long-term efficacy and optimal parameters remain unclear. Consider it an adjunctive therapy, not a standalone solution.
items.limitation: 该Meta分析未能明确报告不同刺激参数对长期效应的影响，且纳入研究间的异质性可能影响结果外推。
items.limitationEn: This meta-analysis did not clearly report the impact of different stimulation parameters on long-term effects, and heterogeneity among included studies may affect generalizability.
items.journal: Physiotherapy research international : the journal for researchers and clinicians in physical therapy

items.title: Establishing weighted criteria for return to play after hamstring injury: a systematic review and methodological quality analysis.
items.summary: A systematic review on hamstring injury return to play (RTP) found a high recurrence rate of 57% within the first month and identified a lack of clear consensus on weighted RTP criteria.
items.curatedReason: 膕绳肌损伤重返运动（RTP）仍缺乏明确、标准化的加权标准。在制定RTP计划时，你需要综合考虑现有证据，别过度依赖单一指标。
items.titleZh: 膕绳肌损伤后重返运动的加权标准建立：一项系统综述和方法学质量分析
items.summaryZh: 一项关于膕绳肌损伤重返运动（RTP）的系统综述发现，首月内复发率高达57%，并指出在加权RTP标准上缺乏明确共识。
items.curatedReasonEn: There is still a lack of clear, standardized weighted criteria for return to play (RTP) after hamstring injury. When developing RTP plans, you need to integrate existing evidence and not over-rely on a single metric.
items.limitation: 系统综述指出现有研究在RTP标准上缺乏共识，且方法学质量分析未详述纳入研究的具体局限。
items.limitationEn: The systematic review noted a lack of consensus in existing research on RTP criteria, and the methodological quality analysis did not elaborate on specific limitations of the included studies.

items.title: Effects of different exercise training modalities on 24-hour ambulatory blood pressure in adults with hypertension: a network meta-analysis of randomised controlled trials
items.summary: A network meta-analysis of 31 RCTs (n=1345) compared the effects of different exercise training modalities on 24-hour ambulatory blood pressure in adults with hypertension, finding combined training effective.
items.curatedReason: 这项网络Meta分析明确了不同运动训练模式对高血压患者24小时动态血压的影响。在为高血压患者制定运动处方时，你可以依据研究结果，优先考虑联合训练，以期获得更佳的血压控制效果。
items.titleZh: 不同运动训练模式对高血压成人24小时动态血压的影响：一项随机对照试验的网络Meta分析
items.summaryZh: 一项包含31项随机对照试验（n=1345）的网络Meta分析比较了不同运动训练模式对高血压成人24小时动态血压的影响，发现联合训练是有效的。
items.curatedReasonEn: This network meta-analysis clarifies the effects of different exercise training modalities on 24-hour ambulatory blood pressure in adults with hypertension. When prescribing exercise for hypertensive patients, you can prioritize combined training based on these findings to achieve better blood pressure control.
items.limitation: 网络Meta分析的结论可能受到纳入研究数量和质量的影响，且血压测量方式的标准化程度可能存在差异。
items.limitationEn: The conclusions of the network meta-analysis may be affected by the number and quality of included studies, and there may be variations in the standardization of blood pressure measurement methods.

items.title: Dose-response interplay between light and moderate-to-vigorous physical activity on all-cause mortality risk: a causal inference analysis
items.summary: A causal inference analysis (n=71,715) using UK Biobank data estimated the dose-response effects of light-intensity physical activity (LPA) on all-cause mortality across different levels of moderate-to-vigorous physical activity (MVPA).
items.curatedReason: 这项研究深入分析了轻度与中高强度体力活动对全因死亡风险的剂量反应关系。你可以利用这些信息，更精确地为患者制定个性化的活动建议，特别是针对那些难以达到高强度运动量的人群。
items.titleZh: 轻度与中高强度体力活动对全因死亡风险的剂量反应相互作用：一项因果推断分析
items.summaryZh: 一项使用英国生物样本库数据（n=71,715）进行的因果推断分析，评估了轻度体力活动（LPA）与中高强度体力活动（MVPA）不同水平下，LPA对全因死亡率的剂量反应效应。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study delves into the dose-response relationship between light and moderate-to-vigorous physical activity and all-cause mortality risk. You can use this information to more precisely tailor individualized activity recommendations for patients, especially for those who struggle to achieve high-intensity exercise levels.
items.limitation: 研究依赖加速度计数据，可能无法完全捕捉所有类型的体力活动，且英国生物样本库人群的代表性可能受限。
items.limitationEn: The study relies on accelerometer data, which may not fully capture all types of physical activity, and the representativeness of the UK Biobank population may be limited.

items.title: The effectiveness of perioperative respiratory muscle exercise in elderly cardiac surgery patients: a randomized controlled trial
items.summary: This RCT evaluated the impact of perioperative respiratory muscle training on respiratory muscle strength, pulmonary function, functional capacity, and prognostic outcomes in elderly patients undergoing cardiac surgery.
items.curatedReason: 这项随机对照试验表明，围手术期呼吸肌训练对老年心脏手术患者的呼吸肌力量、肺功能和功能能力有显著益处。你应将呼吸肌训练纳入老年心脏手术患者的康复方案，以优化预后。
items.titleZh: 围手术期呼吸肌训练对老年心脏手术患者的疗效：一项随机对照试验
items.summaryZh: 这项随机对照试验旨在评估围手术期呼吸肌训练对老年心脏手术患者的呼吸肌力量、肺功能、功能能力和预后结局的影响。
items.curatedReasonEn: This randomized controlled trial demonstrates significant benefits of perioperative respiratory muscle training on respiratory muscle strength, pulmonary function, and functional capacity in elderly cardiac surgery patients. You should incorporate respiratory muscle training into rehabilitation protocols for elderly cardiac surgery patients to optimize outcomes.
items.limitation: 试验的具体样本量和效应量在摘要中未明确给出，限制了对其强度和普适性的初步判断。
items.limitationEn: The specific sample size and effect size of the trial were not explicitly stated in the abstract, limiting initial assessment of its strength and generalizability.
items.journal: Archives of Physical Medicine and Rehabilitation

items.title: Promoting Client-Centered Communication in Rehabilitation: Strategies for Managing Difficult Conversations
items.summary: This article outlines strategies for rehabilitation clinicians to manage difficult conversations, emphasizing client-centered communication to foster strong client-clinician relationships and improve outcomes.
items.curatedReason: 在康复实践中，有效管理困难对话对建立以患者为中心的合作关系至关重要。本文提供了具体策略，帮助你提升沟通技巧，避免潜在的冲突并改善患者依从性。
items.titleZh: 促进康复中的以患者为中心沟通：管理困难对话的策略
items.summaryZh: 本文概述了康复临床医生管理困难对话的策略，强调以患者为中心的沟通，以促进患者与临床医生之间的良好关系并改善预后。
items.curatedReasonEn: In rehabilitation practice, effectively managing difficult conversations is crucial for building client-centered, collaborative relationships. This article provides specific strategies to help you improve communication skills, avoid potential conflicts, and enhance patient adherence.
items.journal: Archives of Physical Medicine and Rehabilitation

items.title: Preventing sudden cardiac death among football athletes in Cameroon: 22-year follow-up to the tragic death of Marc-Vivien Foe - supported by the BJSM Global Research Grant Programme
items.summary: A cross-sectional study (n=211) surveyed Cameroonian football clubs on cardiovascular screening and emergency response planning for sudden cardiac death (SCD) prevention, 22 years after Marc-Vivien Foe's death.
items.curatedReason: 这项喀麦隆足球运动员心脏骤停预防策略的追踪研究，揭示了全球体育运动中心脏筛查和应急响应的现状，对你思考本地体育赛事安全保障有借鉴意义。
items.titleZh: 喀麦隆足球运动员猝死预防：Marc-Vivien Foe悲剧性死亡22年后的追踪研究
items.summaryZh: 一项横断面研究（n=211）调查了喀麦隆足球俱乐部在马克-维维安·福伊（Marc-Vivien Foe）逝世22年后，关于心血管筛查和猝死（SCD）应急响应计划的现状。
items.curatedReasonEn: This follow-up study on sudden cardiac death prevention strategies for Cameroonian football athletes sheds light on the current state of cardiac screening and emergency response in global sports, offering insights for local sports safety protocols.
items.limitation: 这是一项横断面调查研究，无法建立因果关系，且结果可能受参与者回忆偏倚影响。
items.limitationEn: This is a cross-sectional survey study, which cannot establish causality, and results may be subject to participant recall bias.

items.title: Inflammation and alterations in redox homeostasis precede and persist following musculoskeletal injury in US army trainees
items.summary: A prospective observational study (n=206) in US Army trainees found that systemic inflammation and redox homeostasis alterations precede and persist following musculoskeletal injury (MSKI), associating with MSKI occurrence.
items.curatedReason: 这项前瞻性观察研究揭示了炎症和氧化应激生物标志物与美国陆军训练中肌肉骨骼损伤的关联性。你应意识到这些生物标志物可能预示损伤风险，但目前证据不足以指导具体干预。
items.titleZh: 炎症和氧化应激改变先于肌肉骨骼损伤并持续存在于美国陆军受训者中
items.summaryZh: 一项针对206名美国陆军受训者的前瞻性观察研究发现，全身炎症和氧化还原稳态改变在肌肉骨骼损伤（MSKI）发生之前出现并持续存在，与MSKI的发生相关。
items.curatedReasonEn: This prospective observational study reveals the association between inflammatory and oxidative stress biomarkers and musculoskeletal injuries during US Army training. You should be aware that these biomarkers may indicate injury risk, but current evidence is insufficient to guide specific interventions.
items.limitation: 这是一项观察性研究，只能提示关联性，不能建立因果关系。
items.limitationEn: This is an observational study, which can only suggest associations, not establish causality.

items.title: Fitness under fire: a sports and exercise medicine framework to maintain fitness in the context of modern global conflict, enforced confinement and possible radiation exposure
items.summary: This editorial proposes a sports and exercise medicine framework to maintain fitness and optimize well-being amidst modern global conflicts, enforced confinement, and potential radiation exposure.
items.curatedReason: 在面对全球冲突、强制禁闭和辐射暴露等极端条件下，如何维持体能是一项重大挑战。这份运动医学框架为你提供了在该背景下优化健康的思考方向。
items.titleZh: 战火下的体能：应对现代全球冲突、强制禁闭和潜在辐射暴露的运动与锻炼医学框架
items.summaryZh: 这篇社论提出了一个运动与锻炼医学框架，旨在现代全球冲突、强制禁闭和潜在辐射暴露背景下，维持体能并优化身心健康。
items.curatedReasonEn: Maintaining fitness under extreme conditions like global conflict, enforced confinement, and radiation exposure is a major challenge. This sports and exercise medicine framework offers guidance on optimizing well-being in such contexts.

items.title: The effectiveness of cardiovascular rehabilitation for transient ischaemic attack and mild stroke: A randomised controlled trial.
items.summary: This RCT (n=140) found that a 6-week cardiovascular rehabilitation program significantly improved functional exercise capacity (6MWTD, +60 meters vs. usual care at 6 months, p<0.001) and moderate-to-vigorous physical activity in TIA and mild stroke patients compared to usual care over 6 months.
items.curatedReason: 6 个月随访的 RCT 结果提示，对 TIA 或轻度卒中患者，心血管康复在改善运动能力、身体活动和部分生活质量方面优于常规护理。这是你在向患者推荐或向医生转诊时可以引用的强有力证据。
items.titleZh: 心血管康复对短暂性脑缺血发作和轻度卒中患者的有效性：一项随机对照试验
items.summaryZh: 这项纳入 140 名患者的 RCT 发现，为期 6 周的心血管康复计划在 6 个月时显著改善了短暂性脑缺血发作和轻度卒中患者的功能运动能力（6MWTD 较常规护理增加 60 米，p<0.001）和中高强度身体活动。
items.curatedReasonEn: A 6-month RCT suggests that cardiovascular rehabilitation is superior to usual care for improving exercise capacity, physical activity, and some quality-of-life aspects in TIA or mild stroke patients. This is strong evidence you can cite when recommending to patients or referring to physicians.
items.limitation: 研究未报告心血管康复对血压、焦虑和抑郁的具体效果。
items.limitationEn: The study did not report specific effects of cardiovascular rehabilitation on blood pressure, anxiety, and depression.

items.title: Multi-Domain Benefits of Exergaming for Sarcopenia Management in Institutionalized Older Adults: Physical, Psychological, and Social Outcomes.
items.summary: This pragmatic quasi-experimental study (n=72) found that a 12-week exergaming intervention significantly improved physical (e.g., grip strength, 6MWT), psychological (e.g., depression), and social outcomes in institutionalized older adults with sarcopenia compared to a control group.
items.curatedReason: 12 周的主动游戏（exergaming）干预能为机构老年肌少症患者带来多重益处，包括身体、心理和社会功能。在资源受限或传统运动方案依从性不佳时，这提供了一个有前途的替代方案。
items.titleZh: 机构老年肌少症患者主动游戏的多领域益处：身体、心理和社会结局
items.summaryZh: 这项实用的准实验研究（n=72）发现，为期 12 周的主动游戏干预显著改善了机构老年肌少症患者的身体（如握力、6MWT）、心理（如抑郁）和社会结局，优于对照组。
items.curatedReasonEn: A 12-week exergaming intervention can provide multiple benefits for institutionalized older adults with sarcopenia, including physical, psychological, and social function. This offers a promising alternative when resources are limited or adherence to traditional exercise programs is poor.
items.limitation: 准实验研究设计，可能存在选择偏倚和混杂因素。
items.limitationEn: This was a pragmatic quasi-experimental study design, which may have selection bias and confounding factors.
items.journal: Archives of physical medicine and rehabilitation

items.title: Physical Activity in Women With Obesity: Fatigue, Knee Symptoms, and Functional Capacity.
items.summary: This cross-sectional study of 85 women with obesity found that lower physical activity levels were associated with greater functional limitations, musculoskeletal symptoms, and perceived barriers.
items.curatedReason: 肥胖女性的膝关节症状、疲劳和功能能力与较低的身体活动水平相关。在制定干预方案时，别只关注活动量本身，要同时管理这些共病因素。
items.titleZh: 肥胖女性的身体活动：疲劳、膝关节症状与功能能力的关系
items.summaryZh: 一项针对 85 名肥胖女性的横断面研究发现，较低的身体活动水平与更大的功能受限、肌肉骨骼症状和感知障碍相关。
items.curatedReasonEn: Knee symptoms, fatigue, and functional capacity are linked to lower physical activity levels in women with obesity. When designing interventions, address these comorbid factors alongside physical activity promotion.
items.limitation: 本研究为横断面设计，无法确立因果关系。
items.limitationEn: This was a cross-sectional study, so it cannot establish causality.
items.journal: Physiotherapy research international : the journal for researchers and clinicians in physical therapy

items.title: Feasibility of applying the Cognitive Orientation to daily Occupational Performance (CO-OP) approach in a Danish municipal neurorehabilitation context.
items.summary: This single-group feasibility study found that applying the Cognitive Orientation to daily Occupational Performance (CO-OP) approach to stroke survivors in a Danish neurorehabilitation setting was feasible across recruitment, dose, fidelity, perceived value, benefits, and potential outcomes.
items.curatedReason: CO-OP 方法对卒中幸存者的应用是可行的，尤其在招募、干预依从性和患者接受度方面表现良好。尽管是可行性研究，但它提示了未来大规模 RCT 的潜力。
items.titleZh: 认知导向职业表现（CO-OP）方法在丹麦神经康复背景下应用于卒中患者的可行性研究
items.summaryZh: 这项单组可行性研究发现，在丹麦神经康复环境中将认知导向职业表现（CO-OP）方法应用于卒中幸存者是可行的，并在招募、剂量、依从性、感知价值、益处和潜在结果方面表现良好。
items.curatedReasonEn: The CO-OP approach is feasible for stroke survivors, showing good recruitment, fidelity, and perceived value. Although a feasibility study, it suggests potential for future large-scale RCTs.
items.limitation: 这是一项单组前瞻性设计，缺乏对照组，无法评估干预的实际效果。
items.limitationEn: This was a single-group pretest-posttest design, lacking a control group to assess actual intervention effects.

items.title: Blood pressure levels and clinically meaningful changes during inpatient rehabilitation after spinal cord injury: insights from the Dutch Spinal Cord Injury Database.
items.summary: This retrospective cohort study of 1286 SCI patients found that higher SBP and DBP at admission were associated with higher BMI, lower neurological lesion level, and motor incomplete SCI. Clinically meaningful BP changes were common during inpatient rehabilitation.
items.curatedReason: SCI 患者住院康复期间的血压变化受多种因素影响，出入院时血压数据对长期管理有参考价值。这些发现能帮你更精准地评估和管理这些患者的血压风险。
items.titleZh: 脊髓损伤住院康复期间血压水平和临床有意义的变化：来自荷兰脊髓损伤数据库的见解
items.summaryZh: 这项针对 1286 名脊髓损伤（SCI）患者的回顾性队列研究发现，入院时较高的收缩压和舒张压与较高的 BMI、较低的神经损伤平面和运动不完全性 SCI 相关。住院康复期间临床有意义的血压变化很常见。
items.curatedReasonEn: Blood pressure changes during inpatient rehabilitation for SCI patients are influenced by various factors, and admission/discharge data are valuable for long-term management. These findings can help you more precisely assess and manage BP risks in these patients.
items.limitation: 回顾性研究，可能存在数据缺失和混杂因素。
items.limitationEn: This was a retrospective cohort study, which may have missing data and confounding factors.

items.title: Early-Stage Symptomatic Hip Osteoarthritis: A Window of Opportunity.
items.summary: This editorial highlights the growing prevalence of hip osteoarthritis in young adults and emphasizes that early-stage symptomatic hip OA presents a critical opportunity for treatment to slow or change its trajectory, an area often overlooked in research and clinical practice.
items.curatedReason: 早期症状性髋关节骨关节炎的识别和干预是改善预后的“机会窗口”。临床实践中，别等到晚期才关注，早期干预能更好地改变疾病轨迹。
items.titleZh: 早期症状性髋关节骨关节炎：一个“机会窗口”
items.summaryZh: 这篇社论强调了年轻成人髋关节骨关节炎日益增长的患病率，并指出早期症状性髋关节骨关节炎是治疗以减缓或改变其病程的关键“机会窗口”，而这在研究和临床实践中常被忽视。
items.curatedReasonEn: Identifying and intervening in early-stage symptomatic hip OA is a "window of opportunity" for improving prognosis. In clinical practice, don't wait until late stages; early intervention can better alter the disease trajectory.
items.journal: The Journal of orthopaedic and sports physical therapy

items.title: Cost-Effectiveness of Post-Acute Stroke Rehabilitation From a U.S. Healthcare Payer Perspective: Inpatient Rehabilitation Facilities Versus Skilled Nursing Facilities.
items.summary: A decision analytic model evaluating U.S. post-acute stroke care found Inpatient Rehabilitation Facilities (IRFs) to be more cost-effective than Skilled Nursing Facilities (SNFs) from a payer perspective, despite higher initial costs, due to improved patient outcomes and lower readmission rates.
items.curatedReason: 对美国中风后康复的报销决策，这是关键数据。住IRF（急性康复）比SNF（专业护理）更具成本效益，IRF虽然初期成本高，但能带来更好的患者预后和更低的再入院率。这将支持向支付方争取IRF报销覆盖。
items.titleZh: 从美国医保支付方角度看急性卒中后康复的成本效益：住院康复机构（IRF）对比专业护理机构（SNF）
items.summaryZh: 一项评估美国卒中后急性期护理的决策分析模型显示，从支付方角度看，住院康复机构（IRF）比专业护理机构（SNF）更具成本效益，尽管IRF初始成本较高，但能带来更好的患者预后并降低再入院率。
items.curatedReasonEn: This is crucial data for stroke post-acute rehabilitation reimbursement decisions in the U.S. Inpatient Rehabilitation Facilities (IRFs) are shown to be more cost-effective than Skilled Nursing Facilities (SNFs), providing better patient outcomes and lower readmission rates despite higher initial costs. This will support advocating for IRF reimbursement coverage with payers.
items.limitation: 模型研究结果基于模拟数据，而非真实世界RCT。
items.limitationEn: The study's findings are based on a decision analytic model, not real-world RCT data.
items.journal: Archives of physical medicine and rehabilitation

related.title: Cost-Effectiveness of Post-Acute Stroke Rehabilitation From a U.S. Healthcare Payer Perspective: Inpatient Rehabilitation Facilities Versus Skilled Nursing Facilities

items.title: [Correspondence] Make rehabilitation count: invest in people, not just devices
items.summary: A correspondence piece highlights WHO's call to prioritize investment in people and integrate rehabilitation as an essential part of healthcare, moving beyond merely counting diseases to measuring functioning and quality of life.
items.curatedReason: WHO 强调康复投资应侧重“人”而非仅“设备”，这与 Cadence 倡导的以人为本、专业主导康复理念高度契合。这是对全球物理治疗行业具有指导意义的呼吁。
items.titleZh: 通讯：让康复发挥作用——投资于人，而非仅仅设备
items.summaryZh: 一篇通讯强调，世界卫生组织呼吁优先投资于人，并将康复作为医疗保健不可或缺的一部分，从单纯统计疾病转向衡量功能和生活质量。
